nodes.name: Eremalauda
nodes.summary: Eremalauda（Eremalauda）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如图氏沙百灵、Arabian lark。

nodes.name: Arabian lark
nodes.summary: Arabian lark（Eremalauda eremodites）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Arabian lark。

nodes.name: Arabian lark
nodes.summary: The Arabian lark (Eremalauda eremodites) is a small passerine bird of the lark family. It is a desert bird which is found from Syria to Jordan and through Saudi Arabia to Oman. The Arabian lark was formerly considered conspecific with Dunn's lark, but was classified as a distinct species by the Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive and by Birdlife International, and later by the International Ornithological Congress. This species is monotypic. References
